description: Flip-flop toggle using an inverse-lock and a pair of pump/switch nodes.

2003-jeff-binder.skip_reason: Emits 'hello' followed by an infinite 'homeless' loop instead of the expected 'helloo'

2003-cal-henderson.skip_reason: Does not support inverse-lock / pump / switch

2012-quin-kennedy.skip_reason: Emits 'hello' (one 'o' short of the OCaml/JS reference)

2017-addison-bean.notes: Panics with `already borrowed: BorrowMutError` on the first FishDown tick — river.rs:237's move_salmon borrows the parent mutably while the tick recursion still holds it, so any multi-level tree crashes before producing output.

2018-martijn-arts.notes: Does not support inverse-lock / pump / switch nodes.

2023-james-thistlewood.notes: Flip-flop logic doesn't produce any output.
